title: vigna lanceolata var. filiformis
intro: Vigna lanceolata var. filiformis, also known as a type of climbing bean or a variety of the Vigna lanceolata plant, is a climbing legume native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Vigna lanceolata var. filiformis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial properties. Vigna lanceolata var. filiformis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine in various forms, such as dried powder or capsules.
